rules.trigger: when running build or test commands for Android
rules.reason: ensures correct JAVA_HOME (JDK 21) from Android Studio is used
ensures correct environment for Robolectric and Room schemas

rules.action: implement as UI Mock / Prototype only. Do NOT integrate real API endpoints unless explicitly requested.
rules.reason: Web is currently for UX visualization only.

rules.action: implement full functionality with real API integrations.
rules.reason: Android is the primary platform for production features.
